question.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.

variants.text: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.

hints.hint:
Formal inverted conditionals omit **if** and place the auxiliary first: **Should/Were/Had + subject + verb**.
The absence of **if** and the auxiliary at the start are the key signals. Match the conditional type to the tense in the result clause.

Formalne zdania warunkowe z inwersją pomijają **if** i stawiają operator na początku: **Should/Were/Had + podmiot + czasownik**.
Brak **if** i operator na początku to główne sygnały. Dobierz typ warunkowy do czasu w zdaniu głównym.

Інвертований умовний III типу: замість «If it had not been for...» → «Had it not been for...».
«Would have been» у головному реченні — ознака умовного III типу; «Had» виноситься на початок.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. «Had» is the right form here based on the grammar rule for this sentence type.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «Had» jest właściwą formą zgodnie z regułą gramatyczną tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» — правильна інверсія умовного III типу; «Had it not been for» = «If it had not been for».

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» — правильна інверсія умовного III типу; «Had it not been for» = «If it had not been for».

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «Should» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «Should» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Should» — інверсія умовного I типу; III тип (would have been) вимагає «Had».

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Should» — інверсія умовного I типу; III тип (would have been) вимагає «Had».

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «Were» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «Were» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Were» — інверсія умовного II типу; «would have been» вказує на III тип з «had».

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} it not been for the rescue team, the situation would have been fatal.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Were» — інверсія умовного II типу; «would have been» вказує на III тип з «had».
